query:
ALTER TABLE leads 
ADD COLUMN timestampRecebimento timestamp NULL AFTER dataDistribuicao,
ADD COLUMN timerAtivo boolean DEFAULT false AFTER timestampRecebimento,
ADD COLUMN tentativasRedistribuicao int DEFAULT 0 AFTER timerAtivo;
